title: Zywot Mateusza
writer: Witold Leszczynski, Wojciech Solarz, Tarjei Vesaas
actors: Franciszek Pieczka, Anna Milewska, Wirgiliusz Gryn
plot: Mateusz is a weird man living a peaceful life in a remote country house by the lake. When a stranger is attracted to his beloved sister, his life starts falling apart.
